notes: n601 is a pure registry->Postman-collection transform: it reads results/test-case-registry.json (the n600 output) + the summary, filters involves_http_call=true, and emits results/postman-collection.json. It makes NO HTTP calls of its own and NEVER touches DummyJSON. For the forge, results/test-case-registry.json + results/test-case-registry-summary.json are seeded from the *_fixture files above (the phase4 script copies them) because the sibling n600 agent is not built here. Each forge agent emits a Postman Generation Contract; the shared harness applies it; the judge scores fidelity-to-gold + the headline Postman Coverage Rate.
